Dedicated client with 10s timeout\n146\t        self._reload_manager = None\n147\t\n148\t    async def _get_zai_client(self):\n149\t        \"\"\"Get or create ZAI client.\"\"\"\n150\t        if self._zai_client is None:\n151\t            self._zai_client = get_zai_client()\n152\t        return self._zai_client\n153\t\n154\t    async def _get_router_zai_client(self):\n155\t        \"\"\"Get or create dedicated ZAI client for router with 10s timeout for fail-fast behavior.\"\"\"\n156\t        if self._router_zai_client is None:\n157\t            from ..escalate.llm import ZAI_CLIENT_TIMEOUT, ZAI_PROXY_URL, DEFAULT_MODEL\n158\t            self._router_zai_client = get_zai_client(\n159\t                proxy_url=ZAI_PROXY_URL,\n160\t                default_model=DEFAULT_MODEL,\n161\t                timeout=10.0,  # Router should fail fast - 10s instead of default 30s\n162\t            )\n163\t        return self._router_zai_client\n164\t\n165\t    def _get_utterance_hash(self, utterance: str) -> str:\n166\t        \"\"\"Generate hash key for utterance caching.\"\"\"\n167\t        import hashlib\n168\t        return hashlib.md5(utterance.encode()).hexdigest()\n169\t\n170\t    def _get_cached_classification(self, utterance: str, session_id: str) -> list[IntentClassification] | None:\n171\t        \"\"\"Check cache for existing classification.\"\"\"\n172\t        utterance_hash = self._get_utterance_hash(utterance)\n173\t        cache_key = (utterance_hash, session_id)\n174\t\n175\t        if cache_key in _ROUTER_CACHE:\n176\t            classifications, timestamp = _ROUTER_CACHE[cache_key]\n177\t            age = time.time() - timestamp\n178\t            if age < _CACHE_TTL:\n179\t                logger.info(f\"Router cache HIT for utterance hash {utterance_hash[:8]} (age: {age:.1f}s)\")\n180\t                return classifications\n181\t            else:\n182\t                # Remove expired entry\n183\t                del _ROUTER_CACHE[cache_key]\n184\t                logger.info(f\"Router cache EXPIRED for utterance hash {utterance_hash[:8]}\")\n185\t\n186\t        return None\n187\t\n188\t    def _cache_classification(self, utterance: str, session_id: str, classifications: list[IntentClassification]) -> None:\n189\t        \"\"\"Cache classification result.\"\"\"\n190\t        # Prune cache if at capacity\n191\t        if len(_ROUTER_CACHE) >= _MAX_CACHE_SIZE:\n192\t            # Remove oldest entry (first in dict)\n193\t            oldest_key = next(iter(_ROUTER_CACHE))\n194\t            del _ROUTER_CACHE[oldest_key]\n195\t            logger.info(f\"Router cache pruned oldest entry (size: {len(_ROUTER_CACHE)})\")\n196\t\n197\t        utterance_hash = self._get_utterance_hash(utterance)\n198\t        cache_key = (utterance_hash, session_id)\n199\t        _ROUTER_CACHE[cache_key] = (classifications, time.time())\n200\t        logger.info(f\"Router cache STORED utterance hash {utterance_hash[:8]} (cache size: {len(_ROUTER_CACHE)})\")\n201\t\n202\t    async def _get_store(self):\n203\t        \"\"\"Get or create session store.\"\"\"\n204\t        if self.store is None:\n205\t            self.store = get_store()\n206\t        return self.store\n207\t\n208\t    def _get_reload_manager(self):\n209\t        \"\"\"Get or create the hot-reload manager (lazy singleton).\"\"\"\n210\t        if self._reload_manager is None:\n211\t            self._reload_manager = get_reload_manager()\n212\t        return self._reload_manager\n213\t\n214\t    def _load_router_prompt(self) -> str:\n215\t        \"\"\"\n216\t        Load the router segmentation prompt via hot-reload manager.\n217\t\n218\t        Uses the cached prompt from the hot-reload manager, which only reloads\n219\t        when the file mtime changes. This avoids disk I/O on every classification.\n220\t        \"\"\"\n221\t        try:\n222\t            return self._get_reload_manager().get_prompt(\"router\")\n223\t        except Exception as e:\n224\t            logger.error(f\"Failed to load router prompt: {e}\")\n225\t            return _ROUTER_PROMPT_FALLBACK\n226\t\n227\t    def _build_system_prompt(self) -> str:\n228\t        \"\"\"Build the system prompt from the router segmentation prompt.\n229\t\n230\t        Latency optimization: Removed urgency prompt splicing from hot path.\n231\t        The router still classifies urgency based on core intent patterns,\n232\t        without the extra token overhead of separate urgency rules.\n233\t        \"\"\"\n234\t        return self._load_router_prompt()\n235\t\n236\t    async def classify_utterance(\n237\t        self,\n238\t        utterance: str,\n239\t        session_id: str,\n240\t        retry_on_malformed: bool = True,\n241\t    ) -> list[IntentClassification]:\n242\t        \"\"\"\n243\t        Classify an utterance into intents.\n244\t\n245\t        Uses LLM to segment and classify the utterance.\n246\t\n247\t        Args:\n248\t            utterance: The user utterance\n249\t            session_id: Session ID for context\n250\t            retry_on_malformed: If True, perform one corrective retry on JSON parse failure\n251\t\n252\t        Returns:\n253\t            List of IntentClassification objects\n254\t\n255\t        Raises:\n256\t            RouterTimeoutError: LLM call timed out\n257\t            RouterQuotaError: LLM quota exhausted\n258\t            RouterProxyError: LLM proxy unreachable\n259\t            RouterMalformedError: Malformed JSON after corrective retry\n260\t        \"\"\"\n261\t        # OPTIMIZATION 1: Check cache first (eliminates redundant LLM calls)\n262\t        cached_result = self._get_cached_classification(utterance, session_id)\n263\t        if cached_result is not None:\n264\t            return cached_result\n265\t\n266\t        # Use dedicated router client with 10s timeout for fail-fast behavior\n267\t        client = await self._get_router_zai_client()\n268\t\n269\t        # Build user message\n270\t        user_message = f\"Classify this utterance:\\n\\n{utterance}\"\n271\t\n272\t        logger.info(f\"Classifying utterance for session {session_id}\")\n273\t\n274\t        # Build system prompt from prompts/router.md\n275\t        # (hot-reload enabled via reload manager)\n276\t        system_prompt = self._build_system_prompt()\n277\t\n278\t        # Track retry attempt for malformed JSON\n279\t        retry_count = 0\n280\t        raw_response = None\n281\t\n282\t        try:\n283\t            # Measure ZAI proxy call time\n284\t            proxy_start = time.perf_counter()\n285\t            response = await client.call_simple(\n286\t                system_prompt=system_prompt,\n287\t                user_message=user_message,\n288\t                model=ModelClass.SONNET.value,\n289\t                max_tokens=128,  # OPTIMIZATION 2: Reduced from 256 - intent JSON is small\n290\t                temperature=0.0,\n291\t            )\n292\t            proxy_ms = (time.perf_counter() - proxy_start) * 1000\n293\t\n294\t            # Store raw response for error reporting\n295\t            raw_response = response\n296\t\n297\t            # Measure JSON parsing time\n298\t            parse_start = time.perf_counter()\n299\t            try:\n300\t                # Optimized JSON parsing using centralized parser\n301\t                # Uses single-pass find()/rfind() approach (faster than split/rsplit)\n302\t                # Handles GLM-4.7's markdown-fenced responses efficiently\n303\t                # See src/llm/response_parser.py for implementation\n304\t                intents_data = parse_llm_response(response, strip_fences=True, expect_json=True)\n305\t            except ParseLLMError as e:\n306\t                # Already has raw_response attached; just re-raise\n307\t                raise e\n308\t            parse_ms = (time.perf_counter() - parse_start) * 1000\n309\t\n310\t            # Log detailed timing breakdown for latency profiling\n311\t            logger.info(\n312\t                f\"router_timing breakdown: \"\n313\t                f\"proxy_call_ms={proxy_ms:.2f} \"\n314\t                f\"json_parse_ms={parse_ms:.2f} \"\n315\t                f\"total_estimate_ms={proxy_ms + parse_ms:.2f}\"\n316\t            )\n317\t            classifications = []\n318\t\n319\t            for intent_data in intents_data:\n320\t                # Map string to IntentType enum\n321\t                intent_type_str = intent_data.get(\"intent_type\", \"status\")\n322\t                try:\n323\t                    intent_type = IntentType(intent_type_str)\n324\t                except ValueError:\n325\t                    logger.warning(f\"Unknown intent type: {intent_type_str}\")\n326\t                    intent_type = IntentType.STATUS\n327\t\n328\t                classification = IntentClassification(\n329\t                    intent_type=intent_type,\n330\t                    project_slug=intent_data.get(\"project_slug\"),\n331\t                    confidence=float(intent_data.get(\"confidence\", 0.8)),\n332\t                    utterance_fragment=intent_data.get(\"utterance_fragment\", utterance),\n333\t                    reasoning=intent_data.get(\"reasoning\", \"\"),\n334\t                    urgency=intent_data.get(\"urgency\", \"normal\"),\n335\t                    lookup_kind=intent_data.get(\"lookup_kind\") if intent_type == IntentType.LOOKUP else None,\n336\t                )\n337\t                classifications.append(classification)\n338\t\n339\t            logger.info(f\"Classified {len(classifications)} intents from utterance\")\n340\t\n341\t            # OPTIMIZATION 1 (cont): Cache successful classifications\n342\t            self._cache_classification(utterance, session_id, classifications)\n343\t\n344\t            return classifications\n345\t\n346\t        except ParseLLMError as e:\n347\t            \"\"\"\n348\t            First parsing attempt failed - implement corrective retry.\n349\t\n350\t            Router uses corrective retry because it's the first step in the pipeline.\n351\t            A malformed router response cascades to everything downstream.\n352\t            One retry is justified because it's cheap (same prompt, 2048 tokens).\n353\t            \"\"\"\n354\t            logger.error(f\"Failed to parse router response: {e}\")\n355\t            raw_output = e.raw_response or raw_response  # Preserve for error reporting\n356\t\n357\t            # Implement one corrective retry on malformed JSON\n358\t            if retry_on_malformed and retry_count == 0:\n359\t                logger.info(\"Malformed JSON detected, attempting corrective retry...\")\n360\t                retry_count += 1\n361\t                try:\n362\t                    # Retry once with same parameters\n363\t                    return await self.classify_utterance(\n364\t                        utterance=utterance,\n365\t                        session_id=session_id,\n366\t                        retry_on_malformed=False,  # Prevent infinite retry\n367\t                    )\n368\t                except ParseLLMError as retry_e:\n369\t                    # Retry also failed - raise RouterMalformedError\n370\t                    raise RouterMalformedError(\n371\t                        parse_error=str(retry_e),\n372\t                        raw_output=retry_e.raw_response or raw_response,\n373\t                        retry_count=retry_count,\n374\t                    ) from retry_e\n375\t\n376\t            # No retry allowed or retry failed - raise RouterMalformedError\n377\t            raise RouterMalformedError(\n378\t                parse_error=str(e),\n379\t                raw_output=raw_output,\n380\t                retry_count=retry_count,\n381\t            ) from e\n382\t\n383\t        except (LLMTimeoutError, asyncio.TimeoutError) as e:\n384\t            logger.error(f\"Router LLM call timed out: {e}\")\n385\t            raise RouterTimeoutError(f\"Router LLM call timed out: {e}\") from e\n386\t\n387\t        except (LLMRateLimitError,) as e:\n388\t            logger.error(f\"Router LLM call quota exhausted: {e}\")\n389\t            raise RouterQuotaError(f\"Router LLM call quota exhausted: {e}\") from e\n390\t\n391\t        except (LLMError, httpx.HTTPError) as e:\n392\t            logger.error(f\"Router LLM proxy unreachable: {e}\")\n393\t            raise RouterProxyError(f\"Router LLM proxy unreachable: {e}\") from e\n394\t\n395\t        except Exception as e:\n396\t            logger.error(f\"Classification failed with unexpected error: {e}\")\n397\t            # Wrap unknown errors as RouterProxyError for graceful degradation\n398\t            raise RouterProxyError(f\"Router LLM call failed: {e}\") from e\n399\t\n400\t    async def route_utterance(\n401\t        self,\n402\t        utterance: str,\n403\t        utterance_id: str,\n404\t        session_id: str,\n405\t    ) -> list[RoutedIntent]:\n406\t        \"\"\"\n407\t        Route an utterance to appropriate strands.\n408\t\n409\t        Classifies the utterance and routes each intent to the correct strand.\n410\t\n411\t        Args:\n412\t            utterance: The user utterance\n413\t            utterance_id: Unique ID for this utterance\n414\t            session_id: Session ID\n415\t\n416\t        Returns:\n417\t            List of RoutedIntent objects\n418\t\n419\t        Raises:\n420\t            RouterError: If router fails and broadcasts error event\n421\t        \"\"\"\n422\t        # Generate a fallback intent_id for error reporting\n423\t        error_intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n424\t\n425\t        try:\n426\t            # Classify the utterance (one LLM call per utterance — the router stage\n427\t            # is shared across every intent thread it produces, so its duration is\n428\t            # measured once here and stamped onto each RoutedIntent).\n429\t            classify_start = time.monotonic()\n430\t            classifications = await self.classify_utterance(utterance, session_id)\n431\t            router_ms = int((time.monotonic() - classify_start) * 1000)\n432\t\n433\t            routed_intents = []\n434\t            for classification in classifications:\n435\t                # Create intent ID\n436\t                intent_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n437\t\n438\t                routed_intent = RoutedIntent(\n439\t                    intent_id=intent_id,\n440\t                    classification=classification,\n441\t                    session_id=session_id,\n442\t                    utterance=classification.utterance_fragment,\n443\t                    router_ms=router_ms,\n444\t                )\n445\t                routed_intents.append(routed_intent)\n446\t\n447\t            return routed_intents\n448\t\n449\t        except RouterMalformedError as e:\n450\t            # Malformed JSON after corrective retry - broadcast clarification card\n451\t            logger.error(f\"Router malformed after retry: {e.parse_error}\")\n452\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n453\t            await handler.broadcast_clarification_card(\n454\t                utterance=utterance,\n455\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n456\t                session_id=session_id,\n457\t                parse_error=e.parse_error,\n458\t                retry_count=e.retry_count,\n459\t                raw_output_snippet=e.raw_output[:200] if e.raw_output else None,\n460\t            )\n461\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n462\t\n463\t        except RouterTimeoutError as e:\n464\t            # Router LLM timeout - broadcast router_unavailable\n465\t            logger.error(f\"Router timeout: {e}\")\n466\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n467\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n468\t                utterance=utterance,\n469\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n470\t                session_id=session_id,\n471\t                error_reason=\"timeout\",\n472\t            )\n473\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n474\t\n475\t        except RouterQuotaError as e:\n476\t            # Router quota exhausted - broadcast router_unavailable\n477\t            logger.error(f\"Router quota exhausted: {e}\")\n478\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n479\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n480\t                utterance=utterance,\n481\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n482\t                session_id=session_id,\n483\t                error_reason=\"quota_exhausted\",\n484\t            )\n485\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n486\t\n487\t        except RouterProxyError as e:\n488\t            # Router proxy unreachable - broadcast router_unavailable\n489\t            logger.error(f\"Router proxy error: {e}\")\n490\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n491\t            await handler.broadcast_router_unavailable(\n492\t                utterance=utterance,\n493\t                intent_id=error_intent_id,\n494\t                session_id=session_id,\n495\t                error_reason=\"proxy_down\",\n496\t            )\n497\t            raise  # Re-raise so caller knows routing failed\n498\t\n499\t    async def process_intent(\n500\t        self,\n501\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n502\t    ) -> dict:\n503\t        \"\"\"\n504\t        Process a routed intent by dispatching to the appropriate strand.\n505\t\n506\t        Args:\n507\t            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n508\t\n509\t        Returns:\n510\t            Result dictionary with status and data\n511\t        \"\"\"\n512\t        classification = routed_intent.classification\n513\t\n514\t        # Capture per-stage timings for this dispatch and persist one\n515\t        # dispatch_timings row (see Latency Budget & Instrumentation). Each\n516\t        # branch records the stages it measures; router_ms is shared across\n517\t        # the utterance's threads and was stamped on the RoutedIntent. Capture\n518\t        # is non-fatal: a persistence failure logs and moves on, never breaking\n519\t        # the dispatch itself.\n520\t        timings = DispatchTimings()\n521\t        timings.record(\"router_ms\", routed_intent.router_ms)\n522\t\n523\t        # Honesty guards for unimplemented intents\n524\t        if classification.intent_type == IntentType.ACTION:\n525\t            # Action executor is NOT BUILT — broadcast design-only card\n526\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n527\t            await handler.broadcast_action_design_only(\n528\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n529\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n530\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n531\t                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n532\t            )\n533\t\n534\t            # Update intent status to reflect the design-only state\n535\t            store = await self._get_store()\n536\t            await store.update_intent_status(\n537\t                routed_intent.intent_id,\n538\t                \"resolved\",\n539\t                \"Action execution is design-only — executor not built\",\n540\t            )\n541\t\n542\t            return {\n543\t                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n544\t                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n545\t                \"status\": \"design_only\",\n546\t                \"message\": \"Action execution is not yet available\",\n547\t            }\n548\t\n549\t        if classification.intent_type == IntentType.REMINDER:\n550\t            # Reminders are NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — broadcast clarification card\n551\t            handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n552\t            await handler.broadcast_reminder_unavailable(\n553\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n554\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n555\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n556\t            )\n557\t\n558\t            # Update intent status to reflect that reminders are unavailable\n559\t            store = await self._get_store()\n560\t            await store.update_intent_status(\n561\t                routed_intent.intent_id,\n562\t                \"resolved\",\n563\t                \"Reminders are not available yet\",\n564\t            )\n565\t\n566\t            return {\n567\t                \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n568\t                \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n569\t                \"status\": \"unavailable\",\n570\t                \"message\": \"Reminders are not available yet\",\n571\t            }\n572\t\n573\t        try:\n574\t            # For task-profile intents, escalate to bead\n575\t            if classification.intent_type == IntentType.TASK_PROFILE:\n576\t                result = await self._escalate_to_bead(routed_intent, timings)\n577\t            else:\n578\t                # For other intents, fetch then synthesize\n579\t                result = await self._fetch_and_synthesize(routed_intent, timings)\n580\t        except Exception:\n581\t            # Persist whatever was captured before the failure, then re-raise.\n582\t            await self._persist_timings(routed_intent.intent_id, timings)\n583\t            raise\n584\t\n585\t        await self._persist_timings(routed_intent.intent_id, timings)\n586\t        return result\n587\t\n588\t    async def _persist_timings(\n589\t        self,\n590\t        intent_id: str,\n591\t        timings: DispatchTimings,\n592\t    ) -> None:\n593\t        \"\"\"Persist the captured dispatch timings. Non-fatal on error.\"\"\"\n594\t        try:\n595\t            store = await self._get_store()\n596\t            await store.record_dispatch_timings(intent_id, **timings.to_fields())\n597\t        except Exception as e:\n598\t            logger.warning(f\"dispatch timings not recorded for {intent_id}: {e}\")\n599\t\n600\t    async def _fetch_and_synthesize(\n601\t        self,\n602\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n603\t        timings: DispatchTimings,\n604\t    ) -> dict:\n605\t        \"\"\"\n606\t        Fetch context then synthesize into structured result.\n607\t\n608\t        Args:\n609\t            routed_intent: The routed intent to process\n610\t            timings: Per-stage timing collector; records fetch_first_source_ms,\n611\t                fetch_total_ms, and {classification.intent_type.value})\"\n621\t        )\n622\t\n623\t        try:\n624\t            # Step 1: Fetch context — resolve project slug to local repo path\n625\t            fetch_intent_type = self._map_intent_type(\n626\t                classification.intent_type,\n627\t                classification.lookup_kind\n628\t            )\n629\t\n630\t            from ..environment.discovery registry = get_registry()\n636\t            if registry and classification.project_slug:\n637\t                entry = registry.lookup(classification.project_slug)\n638\t                if location = entry.display_path\n643\t                    logger.info(f\"Resolved '{classification.project_slug}' → {location}\")\n644\t                else:\n645\t                    logger.info(f\"No _fetch_argocd_app).\n651\t            project_cfg = (\n652\t                get_project(classification.project_slug)\n653\t                if classification.project_slug else None\n654\t            )\n655\t\n656\t            fetch_request = FetchRequest(\n657\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n658\t                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n659\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n660\t                context=FetchContext(\n661\t                    project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n662\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n663\t                    repo_path=repo_path,\n664\t                    ssh_target=ssh_target,\n665\t                    host_alias=host_alias,\n666\t                    cluster=project_cfg.get(\"cluster\") if project_cfg else None,\n667\t                    namespace=project_cfg.get(\"namespace\") if project_cfg else None,\n668\t                    app_name=project_cfg.get(\"argocd_app\") if project_cfg else None,\n669\t                ),\n670\t            )\n671\t\n672\t            # fetch_first_source_ms = time from fetch start to the first source\n673\t            # resolving (success/fail/timeout — the first progress state on the\n674\t            # pending card). fetch_total_ms = the fetch window close.\n675\t            fetch_start = timings.clock()\n676\t            first_source_at: list[float | None] = [None]\n677\t            total_sources = len(get_fetch_commands(fetch_intent_type))\n678\t            completed_sources: list[int] = [0]\n679\t\n680\t            def _on_fetch_progress(source, result) -> None:\n681\t                \"\"\"Track fetch timing and broadcast progress events to pending card.\"\"\"\n682\t                # Track first source timing for fetch_first_source_ms metric\n683\t                if first_source_at[0] is None:\n684\t                    first_source_at[0] = timings.clock()\n685\t\n686\t                # Increment completed count\n687\t                completed_sources[0] += 1\n688\t\n689\t                # Broadcast progress event to canvas ('3/5 sources in')\n690\t                asyncio.create_task(broadcast_fetch_progress(\n691\t                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n692\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n693\t                    completed=completed_sources[0],\n694\t                    total=total_sources,\n695\t                    source_name=source.value,\n696\t                    source_status=result.status,\n697\t                ))\n698\t\n699\t            fetch_result = await execute_fetch(fetch_request, _on_fetch_progress)\n700\t            timings.record(\"fetch_total_ms\", fetch_result.total_duration_ms)\n701\t            if first_source_at[0] is not None:\n702\t                timings.record(\n703\t                    \"fetch_first_source_ms\",\n704\t                    timings.elapsed_ms(fetch_start, first_source_at[0]),\n705\t                )\n706\t\n707\t            # Check for terminal failure: ALL sources failed (Degraded-State UX)\n708\t            if fetch_result.terminal_failure == \"all_sources_failed\":\n709\t                logger.error(\n710\t                    f\"All fetch sources failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: \"\n711\t                    f\"{len(fetch_result.coverage.failed)} failed, \"\n712\t                    f\"{len(fetch_result.coverage.timed_out)} timed out\"\n713\t                )\n714\t\n715\t                # Build failed sources list for error event\n716\t                failed_sources = []\n717\t                for source, result in fetch_result.sources.items():\n718\t                    failed_sources.append({\n719\t                        \"source\": source.value,\n720\t                        \"status\": result.status,\n721\t                        \"error\": result.error,\n722\t                    })\n723\t\n724\t                # Broadcast all_sources_failed error event\n725\t                handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n726\t                await handler.broadcast_all_sources_failed(\n727\t                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n728\t                    intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n729\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n730\t                    utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n731\t                    failed_sources=failed_sources,\n732\t                )\n733\t\n734\t                # Update intent status to failed\n735\t                store = get_store()\n736\t                await store.update_intent_status(\n737\t                    routed_intent.intent_id,\n738\t                    \"failed\",\n739\t                    \"All fetch sources failed\",\n740\t                )\n741\t\n742\t                return {\n743\t                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n744\t                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n745\t                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n746\t                    \"error\": \"all_sources_failed\",\n747\t                    \"message\": \"No data — all required sources failed\",\n748\t                    \"terminal_failure\": \"all_sources_failed\",\n749\t                }\n750\t\n751\t            # Check for required source failures (terminal condition)\n752\t            required_sources_failed = [\n753\t                s for s in fetch_result.coverage.failed\n754\t                if any(cmd.source == s and cmd.required\n755\t                       for cmd in get_fetch_commands(fetch_result.intent_type))\n756\t            ]\n757\t\n758\t            if sources failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {failure_reason}\")\n761\t\n762\t                # Handle terminal failure\n763\t                await self._handle_terminal_failure_for_intent(\n764\t                    routed_intent=routed_intent,\n765\t                    failure_reason=failure_reason,\n766\t                    error_type=\"required_source_failure\",\n767\t                )\n768\t\n769\t                return {\n770\t                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n771\t                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n772\t                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n773\t                    \"error\": failure_reason,\n774\t                    \"message\": \"Required sources failed - cannot proceed\",\n775\t                }\n776\t\n777\t            # Step 2: Synthesize result\n778\t            synthesize_request = SynthesizeRequest(\n779\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n780\t                intent_type=fetch_intent_type,\n781\t                utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n782\t                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n783\t                fetched_context=fetch_result,\n784\t                urgency=classification.urgency,\n785\t            )\n786\t\n787\t            synth_start = timings.clock()\n788\t            try:\n789\t                synthesize_result = await synthesize_intent(synthesize_request)\n790\t            except Exception as synth_e:\n791\t                # ZAI failure at synthesize stage - broadcast degraded_raw_data\n792\t                # (Degraded-State UX: fetched data is never discarded)\n793\t                logger.error(\n794\t                    f\"Synthesize failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {synth_e}\"\n795\t                )\n796\t\n797\t                handler = get_degraded_state_handler()\n798\t                await handler.broadcast_degraded_raw_data(\n799\t                    intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n800\t                    intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n801\t                    session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n802\t                    utterance=routed_intent.utterance,\n803\t                    fetched_context=fetch_result,\n804\t                    error_reason=str(synth_e),\n805\t                )\n806\t\n807\t                # Update intent status to failed\n808\t                store = get_store()\n809\t                await )\n814\t\n815\t                return {\n816\t                    \"intent_id\": routed_intent.intent_id,\n817\t                    \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n818\t                    \"status\": \"failed\",\n819\t                    \"error\": \"synthesize_failed\",\n820\t                    \"message\": \"Summary unavailable — showing raw fetch data\",\n821\t                    \"degraded\": True,\n822\t                }\n823\t\n824\t            timings.record(\"synthesize_total_ms\", timings.elapsed_ms(synth_start))\n825\t            # synthesize_first_token_ms is not            # Persist result to session store so loadTopics() can display it\n830\t            store = get_store()\n831\t            _topic_type_map = {\n832\t                IntentType.ACTION: \"project\",\n833\t                IntentType.TASK_PROFILE: \"project\",\n834\t            }\n835\t            topic_type = _topic_type_map.get(classification.intent_type, \"research\")\n836\t            topic_id, _ = await store.find_or_create_topic(\n837\t                label=classification.utterance_fragment or routed_intent.utterance[:80],\n838\t                topic_type=topic_type,\n839\t                project_slugs=[classification.project_slug] if classification.project_slug else [],\n840\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n841\t            )\n842\t            await lookup_kind=classification.lookup_kind,\n849\t            )\n850\t\n851\t            result_id = await store.create_result(\n852\t                intent_id=routed_intent.intent_id,\n853\t                topic_id=topic_id,\n854\t                session_id=routed_intent.session_id,\n855\t                summary=synthesize_result.summary,\n856\t                data=synthesize_result.data,\n857\t                urgency=synthesize_result.urgency.value,\n858\t                result_type=result_type,\n859\t            )\n860\t\n861\t            # Render card via hot-path selector (deterministic, no \"rendered_html\": render_outcome.rendered_html,\n887\t                \"component_id\": render_outcome.component_id,\n888\t                \"message\": \"Intent synthesized successfully\",\n889\t            }\n890\t\n891\t        except Exception as e:\n892\t            logger.error(f\"Fetch/synthesize failed for intent {routed_intent.intent_id}: {e}\")\n893\t\n894\t            # Detect terminal            \"intent_type\": classification.intent_type.value,\n904\t                \"status\": \"failed\",\n905\t                \"error\": str(e),\n906\t                \"message\": \"Fetch/synthesize failed - terminal error\",\n907\t            }\n908\t\n909\t    async def _handle_terminal_failure_for_intent(\n910\t        self,\n911\t        routed_intent: RoutedIntent,\n912\t        failure_reason: str,\n913\t        error_type: str,\n914\t        bead_ref: str | None = None,\n915\t    ) -> None:\n916\t        \"\"\"\n917\t        Handle terminal failure for a routed error_type=error_type,\n946\t            bead_ref=bead_ref,\n947\t        )\n948\t\n949\t    def _map_intent_type(self, intent_type: IntentType, lookup_kind: str | None = None) -> FetchIntentType:\n950\t        \"\"\"Map router IntentType to fetch IntentType.\n951\t\n952\t        For lookup intents, route to the subtype-specific fetch matrix based on lookup_kind.\n953\t        \"\"\"\n954\t        # Map enum values by string\n955\t        type_map = {\n956\t            IntentType.STATUS: FetchIntentType.STATUS,\n957\t            IntentType.ACTION: FetchIntentType.ACTION,\n958\t            IntentType.BRAINSTORM: FetchIntentType.BRAINSTORM,\n959\t            IntentType.LOOKUP: FetchIntentType.LOOKUP,\n960\t            IntentType.REMINDER: FetchIntentType.REMINDER,\n961\t            IntentType.SELF_MODIFICATION: FetchIntentType.SELF_MODIFICATION,\n962\t            IntentType.MONITORING_CONFIG: FetchIntentType.MONITORING_CONFIG,\n963\t            IntentType.STUCK: FetchIntentType.STUCK,\n964\t        }\n965\t\n966\t        # For lookup intents with lookup_kind, route to the subtype-specific matrix\n967\t        if intent_type == IntentType.LOOKUP and lookup_kind:\n968\t            if lookup_kind == \"logs\":\n969\t                return FetchIntentType.LOOKUP_LOGS\n970\t            elif lookup_kind == \"config\":\n971\t error types for degraded-state handling\nclass RouterError(Exception):\n    \"\"\"Base exception for router errors.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterTimeoutError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router LLM call timed out.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterQuotaError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router LLM call quota exhausted.\"\"\"\n    pass\n\n\nclass RouterProxyError(RouterError):\n    \"\"\"Router LLM router output (retry {retry_count}): {parse_error}\")\n\n\nclass IntentType(Enum):\n    \"\"\"Intent types that the router can classify.\"\"\"\n    STATUS = \"status\"\n    ACTION = \"action\"\n    BRAINSTORM = \"brainstorm\"\n    LOOKUP = \"lookup\"\n    REMINDER = \"reminder\"\n    SELF_MODIFICATION = \"self-modification\"\n    MONITORING_CONFIG = \"monitoring-config\"\n    TASK_PROFILE =
